## Testing

- [ ] `cd FE && npm run lint`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing or contributor-facing changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I did not add real credentials, customer data, call transcripts, or phone numbers.
- [ ] I checked security/compliance impact, including consent, DNC, auth, webhooks, and PII handling.
